_readme: Per-region scraper source lists. Shared by src/app/api/scrape/route.js (the hourly cron endpoint) and scraper.js (manual/local runs) via require()/import — kept as JSON specifically so both a CommonJS script and the Next.js route handler can load the exact same data instead of drifting out of sync. requiresKeywordFilter=true marks sources known to mix syndicated national/wire content into their local feed (Pattison Media portal network, sister-station sites) — syncFeed() filters those against the region's keywordFilter regex before saving. manitoba and british-columbia were populated July 2026, after Alberta was proven out per WCNEWSFEED_HANDOFF.md's suggested milestone — a few entries in each carry a 'note' flagging that the exact feed URL couldn't be independently confirmed ahead of time (the research tool used couldn't reach that specific domain); the first live scrape's response summary is the real confirmation, same as it was for Postmedia sources originally.

sources.name: Regina Leader-Post
sources.note: Postmedia — actively blocks scraping, expect this to fail often (see handoff).

sources.name: Saskatoon StarPhoenix
sources.note: Postmedia — actively blocks scraping, expect this to fail often (see handoff).

alberta.keywordFilter: \b(alberta|alta\.?|calgary|edmonton|red deer|lethbridge|medicine hat|fort mcmurray|grande prairie|airdrie|spruce grove|leduc|okotoks|cochrane|lloydminster|camrose|canmore|banff|jasper|st\.? albert|sherwood park|wetaskiwin|brooks|high river|strathmore|olds|innisfail|drumheller|hinton|whitecourt|slave lake|peace river|high level|taber|coaldale|didsbury|stony plain|beaumont)\b
